title: Lakshmi Narasimha Temple, Nuggehalli
tagline: Lakshmi Narasimha Temple, Nuggehalli — spiritual town of Karnataka

overview.short: The Lakshmi Narasimha temple is a 13th-century Hindu temple with Hoysala architecture in Nuggehalli village, Hassan district, Karnataka, India.
overview.description: The Lakshmi Narasimha temple is a 13th-century Hindu temple with Hoysala architecture in Nuggehalli village, Hassan district, Karnataka, India. This three shrine Vaishnava complex is dedicated to Keshava, Lakshmi Narasimha, and Venugopala. It was built in 1246 CE by Bommanna Dandanayaka, a commander in the Hoysala Empire during the rule of King Vira Someshwara. The temple is notable for its Vaishnava reliefs, Shaiva reliefs such as those of Harihara, Dakshinamurti, Chandikesvara and Ganesha, Shakti reliefs such as of Durga Mahisasuramardini, dancing Lakshmi and Saraswati, as well as Vedic deit

topPlaces.name: Sadasiva Temple, Nuggehalli
topPlaces.description: The Sadasiva temple at Nuggehalli is a 13th-century Shiva temple with Hoysala architecture in Nuggehalli village, Hassan district, Karnataka, India. The temple is one of the best illustrations of the Hoysala era Nagara temple with the stellate style, remarkable for its octagonal star configuration with clean, simple aesthetics.

topPlaces.name: Agrahara Belaguli
topPlaces.description: Agrahara Belaguli is a village in Karnataka, India. It is situated about 25 km northeast from Channarayapattana in Hassan district.

topPlaces.name: Bagur, Hassan

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Lakshmi Narasimha Temple, Nuggehalli?
faq.a: The best time to visit Lakshmi Narasimha Temple, Nuggehalli is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Lakshmi Narasimha Temple, Nuggehalli?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Mysuru Airport (89 km) and the nearest railway station is Mysuru Junction (80 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Lakshmi Narasimha Temple, Nuggehalli?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Lakshmi Narasimha Temple, Nuggehalli at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Lakshmi Narasimha Temple, Nuggehalli?
faq.a: Stays in Lakshmi Narasimha Temple, Nuggehalli start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Lakshmi Narasimha Temple, Nuggehalli?
faq.a: The top attractions are Sadasiva Temple, Nuggehalli, Agrahara Belaguli, Bagur, Hassan, Bagur, Karnataka.
